title: Fix remote audio not audible during video calls

requirements.summary: Fix the video call feature so that the remote party's audio is audible during a call by correctly attaching the remote media stream to a dedicated audio/video element with proper attributes
acceptanceCriteria: The VideoCallModal renders a dedicated audio or video element for the remote stream that has its srcObject set and is not muted.
getUserMedia in useVideoCall.ts requests both audio and video (audio: true, video: true).
The remote audio element has autoPlay set to true so playback begins without user interaction.
No console errors related to audio playback or media streams occur during the call lifecycle.
Ending the call stops all media tracks and removes the srcObject from the remote audio/video element.

file_operations.description: Update getUserMedia call to request both audio and video by setting audio: true and video: true in the constraints. Ensure the returned stream includes audio tracks and that cleanup properly stops all tracks on unmount or call end.

Add a dedicated <audio> element (or reuse the remote <video> element) with a ref to attach the remote media stream. Set the element's srcObject to the remote stream, ensure muted={false}, and set autoPlay={true}. On call end or component unmount, clear the srcObject and stop all remote tracks. Handle any audio playback errors gracefully and log them without breaking the UI.
